song.title: Abiding In The Vine
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C V4 C E
song.lyrics:
[V1] . D 1) We’ve found the secret of living. . A We’ve seen the vision divine. .D We are of God in Christ Jesus. . G D A D We’re abiding, abiding in the vine.
[C] Chorus . G D Abiding in the vine, |Abiding in the vine, .E A A7 All the riches of God’s life are mine! .D Praise God, He put us here, .G Never to leave; oh, we’re . D A7 D Abiding, abiding in the vine.
[V2] . D 2) No more in vain need we struggle, . A Trying “the way in” to find. .D Praise God - we’re “in Him” already. . G D A D Hallelujah, abiding in the vine.
[V3] . D 3) In us, the ointment is moving. . A ‘Tis the anointing divine. . D God’s precious essence bestowing, . G D A D While abiding, abiding in the vine.
[V4] . D 4) Now in the life-flow we’re living. . A O how the light in us shines! . D Both God and man are at home now .G D A D By the mutual abiding in the vine.
[E] 1) We’ve found the secret of living. We’ve seen the vision divine. We are of God in Christ Jesus. We’re abiding, abiding in the vine. Chorus Abiding in the vine, |abiding in the vine, All the riches of God’s life are mine! Praise God, He put us here, Never to leave; oh, we’re Abiding, abiding in the vine. 2) No more in vain need we struggle, Trying “the way in” to find. Praise God - we’re “in Him” already. Hallelujah, abiding in the vine. 3) In us, the ointment is moving. ‘Tis the anointing divine. God’s precious essence bestowing, While abiding, abiding in the vine. 4) Now in the life-flow we’re living. O how the light in us shines! Both God and man are at home now By the mutual abiding in the vine.
